addLiquidity(bytes).details: Add liquidity to the AMM provider.Only the asset manager can execute it.

params.data: The data for the add liquidity.

claimAMMFees(bytes).details: Claim fees from the Uniswap V3 position.Only the owner can execute it, the claim fees must go to the owner (vault).

params.data: The data for the claim fees.

getLiquidity(bytes).details: Get the liquidity of the AMM provider.Only the asset manager can execute it.

params.data: The data for the get liquidity.

params.newOwner: The address of the new owner.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

removeLiquidity(bytes).details: Remove liquidity from the AMM provider.Only the asset manager can execute it.

params.data: The data for the remove liquidity.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

swap(bytes).details: Swap tokens on the AMM provider.Only the asset manager can execute it.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

addLiquidity(bytes).notice: Add liquidity to the AMM provider.

claimAMMFees(bytes).notice: Claim fees from the Uniswap V3 position.

getLiquidity(bytes).notice: Get the liquidity of the AMM provider.

removeLiquidity(bytes).notice: Remove liquidity from the AMM provider, this will also collect the fees.

swap(bytes).notice: Swap tokens on the AMM provider.
